title: Double Jump Boost
description: Turns Jump Boost into a double (or triple) jump!
body:
Replaces the increased jump height from jump boost with a double (or triple) jump, based on the effect level. Each level of jump boost allows you to jump one more time in midair. Landing will reset your jump count, and a successful mace hit will recover one jump. As you'd expect, jumping at the end of a fall before hitting the ground will avoid or reduce fall damage depending on timing. This makes jump boost more controllable and desirable in survival mode.

![Jump boost potion tooltip showing "+1 Air Jumps"](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/3c55f26d0b0e0b159454d87b746d4b2fa20f548f.png)
